description_long: This is a rectangular microwave oven with a clean, modern design, primarily finished in a light gray or white color. The front features a large, dark-tinted rectangular window set into the door, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber, and a control panel to the right with a few subtle button outlines. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, except for three vertical vent slits on the right side and a square panel on the left. The back is plain, lacking any visible features or openings. The overall appearance is minimalistic, with sharp edges and a boxy silhouette, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy microwave oven with a large front window, side vents, and a minimalistic light gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large dark window on the door and a control panel with subtle button outlines on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring a square panel, with no visible controls or vents.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying three vertical vent slits near the back.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, vertically aligned. It features a few rectangular button outlines arranged in a column, with no visible dials or display screens. The panel is minimalistic, lacking detailed labeling or digital displays.
attribute_door_handle_design: There is no distinct protruding handle; the door appears to be opened by pulling on the lower edge or side of the door, which is slightly recessed for grip. The design is integrated and flush with the door surface.
attribute_vent_placement: Three vertical vent slits are present near the rear of the right side panel. No other vents are visible on the top, left, or rear surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark-tinted window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
